title: He often does this!
question: 把今天课文里“东西不见了 -> 着急 -> 原来只是熟悉的小习惯”放进你自己的生活场景。这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。用 word bank 填 3 个空。
example_answer: I had left my schoolbag beside the door. Then I couldn't find it, so I couldn't go to class. Later, my little brother gave it back to me. He had taken it to the sofa. He often does this!

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 之前发生的事：你把书包放在门边

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 着急的原因：你找不到包，所以不能去上课
options.english_template: I couldn't go to class because I ___ my schoolbag.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 轻松结尾：弟弟把包还给你，原来他经常这样做
options.english_template: My little brother gave it back to me. ___.
